mapper.sql: r.id, r.rule_name AS ruleName, r.lesson_warning_enabled AS lessonWarningEnabled, r.lesson_threshold AS lessonThreshold, r.days_warning_enabled AS daysWarningEnabled, r.days_threshold AS daysThreshold, r.status AS status, r.created_by AS createdBy, r.updated_by AS updatedBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(r.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(s.storeName) FROM pt_renewal_warning_rule_store_rel rel LEFT JOIN store s ON s.storeId = rel.store_id WHERE rel.rule_id = r.id) AS storeNames
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_renewal_warning_rule (rule_name, lesson_warning_enabled, lesson_threshold, days_warning_enabled, days_threshold, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{lessonWarningEnabled}, #{lessonThreshold}, #{daysWarningEnabled}, #{daysThreshold}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM pt_renewal_warning_rule WHERE id IN
#{id}
